Index.title: Veeresh | Software Developer | Python Specialist
Index.description: Software Developer with 3 years of experience in backend development and cross-platform automation. Specializing in Python, Java, Node.js, Playwright, and Airtest.

hero.subtitle: A Full Stack Developer
hero.punchline: I build high-performance software that doesn't just work—it scales.

highlights: Designed containerized microservices using Docker and Express.js with emphasis on scalability and security.
Built high-performance APIs using FastAPI with OAuth 2.0 authentication & role-based access control.
Developed real-time visualization systems using Spring Boot + React.js for low-latency dashboards.
Automated infrastructure monitoring & secure SMTP-based alerting using Python.
Integrated procurement APIs including Mouser and Digi-Key for real-time pricing and part validation.
Built custom pricing engines using Python Pandas to handle multi-currency and complex pricing logic.
Collaborated with cross-functional Japanese teams to align engineering solutions with business requirements.

EngineRoom.title: How I Deliver Results
EngineRoom.subtitle: I am a Software Developer with 2.7 years of professional experience. I build robust backend systems and automation workflows that bridge technical complexity with business efficiency.
EngineRoom.intro: I specialize in architecting N-tier systems and driving process automation. From building booking management systems with Express.js, PostgreSQL, and Redis to automating price validation through Python and FastAPI, I focus on delivering clean, maintainable, and high-performance code. Having worked onsite in Japan, I combine international professional discipline with a rigorous, detail-oriented approach to every project.

speed.title: Agile Implementation
speed.desc: I transform complex requirements into functional, high-performance backends. I prioritize rapid development cycles without compromising on architectural integrity.

security.title: Robust Architecture
security.desc: I approach every project with a focus on security and reliability, ensuring that the N-tier structures I build are hardened and resilient against bottlenecks.

optimization.title: Performance Tuning
optimization.desc: Efficiency is built into my workflow. Whether it is optimizing database queries in PostgreSQL or refining Python-based automation pipelines, I extract maximum performance.

reliability.title: International Discipline
reliability.desc: My experience working in Japan has ingrained in me a standard of excellence and consistency, ensuring that every feature I deliver aligns with long-term product goals.

isolation.title: Problem Decomposition
isolation.desc: I excel at breaking down large-scale requirements into modular components, isolating technical hurdles, and executing precise, effective solutions.

debt.title: Sustainable Code
debt.desc: I write clean, modular, and well-documented code, ensuring that the systems I build—like the booking management system for the Chancery Group—remain maintainable for future engineers.

scalable.title: Scalable Thinking
scalable.desc: I design with the future in mind. I build solutions that handle the immediate load while maintaining the structural flexibility required to scale tomorrow.

cases.title: Booking Management System (Chancery Group)
cases.challenge: The client required a robust, secure system to manage complex booking operations while maintaining high data integrity and granular user access control.
cases.solution: Architected an N-tier system leveraging Express.js for the backend, PostgreSQL for structured data, and Redis for high-speed caching. Implemented strict ACL-based security to manage multi-level user permissions, ensuring a secure and efficient booking lifecycle.

cases.title: Procurement Automation Tool (Japan)
cases.challenge: The procurement process was manual, slow, and prone to human error when handling large-scale supplier pricing data.
cases.solution: Developed an automated price validation and sourcing tool using FastAPI for high-performance API endpoints and Pandas for complex data manipulation. The tool significantly reduced manual effort by automating supplier part identification and pricing verification.

cases.title: Real-Time Price Board & Monitoring
cases.challenge: Need for real-time visibility into fluctuating price data and critical system health alerts.
cases.solution: Built a high-performance Spring Boot backend paired with a dynamic React.js dashboard to visualize stock fluctuations. Integrated a custom Python-based downtime monitor with automated SMTP alerting to ensure immediate visibility into system outages.

cases.title: Data Scraping & Collection Infrastructure
cases.challenge: Requirement to aggregate large datasets from industrial trade show sources (JIMTOF) for competitive analysis.
cases.solution: Engineered a scalable web scraping engine using Python to systematically crawl and organize industrial data. The framework automated the collection of critical trade show intelligence, transforming unstructured web data into structured, actionable insights.

1.title: Parts Price Management Tool
1.desc: A web-based system designed to automate retrieving, comparing, and analyzing electronic component pricing from Mouser and Digi-Key APIs. Features real-time SSE streaming, data normalization, and dynamic calculation for optimal purchase quantities based on price breaks.

2.title: The Chancery Project
2.desc: Designed containerized microservices using Docker and Express.js with a focus on scalability and security. Built high-performance APIs using FastAPI with OAuth 2.0 authentication and role-based access control. Developed a real-time data visualization system using Spring Boot and React.js for low-latency dashboards. Automated infrastructure monitoring and secure SMTP-based alerts using Python.

Contact.title: Let's Build Something Together
Contact.subtitle: Currently open for new opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
